hook: A version of Twix with peanut butter instead of caramel, first sold in 1983 and discontinued and brought back more than once over the years.
fate: Mars discontinued Peanut Butter Twix in 1997 and again in 2007. The company brought it back in 2000 and again in 2017. Its availability has varied by year and retailer ever since.
summary: Peanut Butter Twix is a version of the Twix candy bar that uses peanut butter where the original uses caramel. Mars first introduced it in the United States in 1983. The bar was discontinued in 1997 and returned in 2000. Mars pulled it again around 2007 and brought it back once more in 2017. Its availability has never been as steady as the original Twix, which is why many people remember it as a candy bar that keeps disappearing and coming back.
notable_products: Peanut Butter Twix, the original 1983 version with a shortbread cookie base, a peanut butter layer in place of caramel, and a milk chocolate coating
Twix PB, a version introduced around 2007 that swapped the original sugar cookie for a chocolate cookie while keeping the peanut butter filling
overview_md:
**Peanut Butter Twix** is a version of the Twix candy bar that uses peanut butter in place of the standard caramel layer. It has the same cookie base and milk chocolate coating as the original, just with peanut butter instead.

Mars first introduced Peanut Butter Twix in the United States in 1983. The bar built a following over the years, and many people who grew up eating it in the 1980s and 1990s still remember it clearly.

Mars discontinued it in 1997, then brought it back in 2000. That second run lasted until around 2007, when it was pulled again. Around that time Mars also introduced a version called Twix PB that used a chocolate cookie base instead of the original sugar cookie.

In 2017 Mars brought the bar back again. The company announced the return that summer and the bar reached stores in September. People who had been asking for it on social media and in petitions were happy to hear the news.

Its availability has never been as reliable as the original Twix. Depending on the year and where you shop, it can be easy to find or hard to track down. That uneven history is a big part of why people still talk about it and search for it.

timeline.text: Peanut Butter Twix is introduced in the United States with a shortbread cookie base, a peanut butter layer, and a milk chocolate coating.
Mars discontinues Peanut Butter Twix in the US.
Peanut Butter Twix returns to US stores after customer demand.
Mars discontinues Peanut Butter Twix again and introduces Twix PB, a similar bar with a chocolate cookie base instead of the original sugar cookie.
Mars officially announces the return of Peanut Butter Twix. The bar reaches stores in September.

sources.label: PR Newswire — Mars announces return of TWIX Peanut Butter (2017)
NACS Daily — Mars introduces TWIX Dark and brings back TWIX Peanut Butter
Vending Times — TWIX Peanut Butter makes comeback

seo.meta_description: Peanut Butter Twix replaced the caramel in a Twix with peanut butter. First sold in 1983, it was discontinued in 1997, brought back in 2000, pulled again in 2007, and returned once more in 2017.
